title: vitis amurensis var. genuina
intro: Vitis amurensis var. genuina, also known as Amur grape, is a deciduous woody vine native to East Asia, belonging to the Vitis genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis amurensis var. genuina include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
